overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through Night City. The journey begins on a street under an overpass with orange sidewalk tiles and neon billboards, continues up a concrete stairwell, through a vibrant LED-lit pedestrian tunnel where the player attacks an NPC, and ends on an elevated walkway overlooking the city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-tiled sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing neon signs and billboards

entered.detail: large white billboard with black text and circular logo mounted on building
distinctive orange geometric patterned pavement covering the pedestrian walkway
massive concrete highway overpass with support columns creating partial cover
tall vertical digital billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO' text with colorful graphics
various glowing neon signs and storefront lights along the left building facade

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a covered urban sidewalk with distinctive orange tiles beneath a massive highway overpass. Neon signs and large billboards including 'NICOLA' and 'EL GUAPO' line the street while sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic moves through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell connecting street level to upper pedestrian walkway

events.description: turns left from the sidewalk and begins ascending the concrete staircase to the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs following an NPC in a white tank top who is walking ahead

notable_agents.action: walking up the stairs ahead of the player wearing a white tank top and khaki shorts

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with yellow safety striping on the edges leading upward
rough gray concrete walls enclosing the stairwell on both sides
fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the open street into a narrow concrete stairwell, ascending to the upper pedestrian level. The environment becomes enclosed with artificial lighting, and the player follows an NPC up the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic pedestrian tunnel with dynamic colored LED floor projections

events.description: attacks and incapacitates the NPC in the white tank top near the tunnel exit, dealing 46 damage

agents.ego_description: walking through the vibrant LED tunnel then engaging in melee combat with the NPC ahead, striking them down at the tunnel exit

notable_agents.action: running ahead through the tunnel, then being struck and falling to the ground at the exit

entered.detail: arched pedestrian tunnel with transparent sections and vibrant rainbow LED light strips on the floor
curved transparent and colored glass panels forming the tunnel ceiling with metal framework
dynamic colored light patterns projected onto the walkway floor shifting between pink, blue, yellow, and green
orange and teal safety railings lining both sides of the elevated tunnel walkway

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a visually striking pedestrian tunnel with a curved glass roof and dynamic rainbow LED projections covering the floor. The player follows an NPC through the tunnel and attacks them at the far exit, incapacitating them before leaving the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated concrete pedestrian walkway with city street views

events.description: exits the colorful LED tunnel into the darker concrete upper walkway overlooking the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper level concrete corridor, passing other pedestrians, approaching the street overlook

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction past the player wearing a red shirt

entered.detail: gray concrete pedestrian bridge with rectangular support columns and overhead covering
large rectangular openings in the left wall revealing the neon-lit cityscape and buildings outside
long white fluorescent tube lights mounted on the concrete ceiling
opening at the end of the walkway providing elevated view of the street below with railings

segments.scene_description: Having exited the vibrant tunnel, the player walks through a darker concrete elevated walkway with fluorescent lighting. Large windows reveal the neon cityscape outside, and the player approaches an overlook of the street below while passing other pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit urban street, ascending through an enclosed transit hub to an elevated city overlook. It begins on a covered sidewalk with orange tiles beneath a massive highway overpass, passing by glowing billboards for Nicola and El Guapo. As the camera moves away from the open street, it transitions into a narrow concrete stairwell, ascending toward an upper pedestrian level. The scene then shifts into a visually striking tunnel with a curved glass roof and rainbow LED projections on the floor, where the player follows and attacks an NPC at the far exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the vibrant tunnel into a darker concrete walkway with fluorescent lighting, passing pedestrians and large windows that reveal the sprawling neon cityscape below.
